vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry is largely inaccurate regarding current biological presence. P1 (String of Nickels) is absent/unidentifiable. P2 (Mexican Mint) is absent/unidentifiable. P3 (Pothos) is present but struggling. P4 (Silver Guest) is absent/unidentifiable.

inventory_reconciliation.P1: Systemic Loss: Yellow pot contains only soil/debris.
inventory_reconciliation.P2: Systemic Loss: Black pot contains only soil/debris.
inventory_reconciliation.P3: Present: Pothos leaf visible with rabbit anchor.
inventory_reconciliation.P4: Systemic Loss: No evidence of Silver Guest.

plant_audit.P3_Pothos: The specimen shows severe chlorosis and turgor loss. The leaf is thin and appears to be detaching or dying back.
plant_audit.General_Biome: The desk surface shows significant debris (electronic components/shards). Soil in all pots appears hydrophobic or neglected.

vision_report.biome_observations: The environment is characterized by high levels of abiotic debris (white shards, electronic pins). No signs of moss or secondary growth; the soil appears sterile and dry.
vision_report.temporal_deltas: From Earliest to Current: The Pothos leaf has undergone progressive wilting and color degradation. The structural integrity of the plant has collapsed, moving from a healthy posture to a near-total loss of turgor.
vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is in a state of critical decline. The lack of visible foliage in P1, P2, and P4 indicates total specimen failure. P3 is the only remaining biological entity and is in a terminal state of dehydration.
vision_report.anomalies: Presence of non-botanical debris (electronic pins, white crystalline shards) suggests the desk is being used for non-botanical storage, which may be contributing to the neglect of the specimens.
vision_report.narrative_description: The botanical audit reveals a failed indoor garden. Only one specimen (P3) remains, and it is in a state of advanced senescence. The other pots are devoid of life, suggesting either total mortality or complete removal of the specimens. The environment is cluttered with inorganic debris, indicating a lack of maintenance.
